The '''Third Battle of Goff''' was an ambush set up by the [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces of the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]].

==The Battle==
The battle began shortly after the Calamari Cruiser [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] arrived at the set coordinates in the [[Goff system/Legends|Goff system]]; [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] [[Conqueror (Imperial-class)|''Conqueror'']] and ''[[Nemesis]]'' were in hot pursuit, with the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Compellor]]'' in tow.

[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] immediately engaged the starfighters launched by the two Star Destroyers and prevented any possible bomber attack against the ''Liberty'' while [[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Squadron]] powered up its engines to engage the capital ships. Meanwhile the ''Compellor'' powered up its [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]], preventing the Rebel forces from jumping to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

With this in mind, commander of the ''Liberty'' ordered Green Squadron to attack the interdictor. After several [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] hits, the interdictor's shields collapsed, forcing it to retreat from the battle. Green Squadron then turned on the Star Destroyers and brought down their shields as well. At some point during the melee, the [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|light Calamari Cruiser]] [[Condor (MC40a light cruiser)|''Condor'']] entered the fray and added its own firepower to the ''Liberty''{{'s}} own. Eventually, the Rebel fighters were able to disable the Star Destroyers with ion cannons and finish them off.

==Aftermath==
The Battle of Goff was a comparatively easy victory for the Alliance despite the fact that they were up against two Star Destroyers with only one Calamari Cruiser and its complement of fighters. The victory also helped to build morale after the withdrawal from [[Gelgelar system/Legends|Gelgelar]].

The loss of half of [[Task Force Vengeance]]'s four initial Star Destroyers greatly undermined the Imperial's projection of force in the sector. Furthermore it let [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] realize the threat that interdictors such as ''Compellor'' posed and eventually settled on a plan to capture the technology for their own use.

==Appearances==
